stemHtml: According to EASA-OPS regulations, which of the following statements regarding landing distance for a turbojet-powered aeroplane is correct?

options.a: When determining the maximum allowable landing mass at destination, 60% of the available landing runway length should be taken into account.
options.b: An inoperative anti-skid system has no effect on the required runway length.
options.c: Reverse thrust is one of the factors always taken into account when determining the landing distance required.
options.d: The runway slope shall only be taken into account when it is greater than ± 5%.
